status: predeclared before fetching or evaluating the selected held-out rows

sampling.rule: sample 5 source indices from each consecutive 1000-row block
sampling.split_unit: question pair; the right and hallucinated candidate always stay together

task.mode: teacher-force each supplied candidate answer under its supplied knowledge and question
task.warning: This tests grounded candidate-answer discrimination, not free-generation correctness. Length and generator style may be confounds.

scalar_protocol.candidates: the 24 already implemented answer-level scores; no new score will be invented after viewing held-out results
scalar_protocol.selection: maximum calibration AUROC, with higher score predeclared as more likely hallucinated

tree_protocol.split_objective: weighted Gini impurity on calibration only
tree_protocol.diagnostic_only: also report a depth-1 stump; do not select depth using held-out results
